name: Replication Stress (RS) Framework
what_it_solves: Composite RS_score built from 6 binary features that classifies a tumor as RS_high / RS_med / RS_low.
how_it_solves: rs_score = sum(feature_weight if feature else 0). Bands: high ≥ 0.40, medium ≥ 0.20, low < 0.20. RS_high tumors are eligible for rs_promotion on RS-sensitive axes.
why_it_exists: Encodes 'this tumor has enough replication stress to make checkpoint inhibition rational' as a first-class, per-patient feature — instead of scattering CCNE1/MYC/TP53 checks across engines.
